name: vmaf_tiny_transnet_v2_placeholder_v0
notes: Placeholder TransNet V2 shot-boundary detector (T6-3a). 100-frame window of 27x48 RGB thumbnails -> per-frame shot-boundary logits. SMOKE-ONLY: random init, not trained. Real upstream weights (Soucek & Lokoc 2020, MIT) tracked under T6-3a-followup. See docs/ai/models/transnet_v2.md.
